Name: Date
Description: Dispatch date (timestamp of the dispatch/state-3 message)
Values: Date. Example: 2026-06-11. Accepts datetime, DD/MM/YYYY (e.g. 14/1/2025), and relative words (today/tomorrow/Tuesday) resolved against message date.

Name: REF
Values: Text. Example: SL-7346. Formats: SL-#### (Specialty Lot). Explicit in chat or looked up from the lot discussed.

Name: Outturn
Values: Text. Example: 17KN0076 (##XX#### = year + origin + serial; KN=Kenya). Given by lab; rarely in casual chat.

Name: Name
Description: Estate / station / mark name (the coffee being sent)
Values: Text. Examples: KABINGARA/KIRINYAGA, AA SANGALAI, AA Swara.

Name: GRADE
Values: Enum+. AA (largest 17/18), AB (screen 15/16), PB (peaberry), C (smaller than AB), E (elephant), TT (winnowed lighter beans). Also HE/MH/ML/NH (inferred Mbuni grades - CONFIRM). Modifiers: TOP, PLUS, FAQ, SC 17.

Name: Bags
Description: Number of bags in the source lot
Values: Number. Example: 732 (from 'we have 732 bags of AB').

Name: Description
Values: Text. Example: WOC samples (WOC = World of Coffee expo - inferred, CONFIRM).

Name: Receiver/Company
Description: Who receives it (external client OR internal Sucafina office)
Values: Text. Examples: sucafina NV, Geneva, Key Coffee. Resolve against Client Details. Internal destinations (Sucafina NV / Geneva / China office) flagged distinctly from end clients.

Name: AWB#
Values: Text (digits only). Example: 7726241423. Strip all non-digits; store as string to preserve leading zeros.

Name: Courier
Values: Enum: DHL, FedEx, UPS, Kiptoo, Rider, Wells Fargo, Hand Delivery, Picked by Client, SGS Kenya. Case-insensitive match, collapse whitespace, map to canonical.

Name: Qty
Values: Text/number. Examples: 500, 1KG. Bare numbers = grams; 1KG = 1000g. Recommend normalizing to {value, unit}.

Name: Result
Values: Enum: Approved, Rejected, Pending. Mostly empty on this sheet - most Specialty samples never get a logged verdict.

Name: Crop Year
Values: Text. Example: 2025/2026. From lot metadata / crop discussion (rarely in chat).

Name: Crop/Area Details
Values: Text. Growing area / county (rarely in chat).
